# Helium MCP — llms.txt

> News bias scoring (37 dimensions, 200+ sources) and ML options pricing (`prob_itm`) via streamable HTTP MCP. Free tier, no API key.

Helium is a remote MCP server at `https://heliumtrades.com/mcp` with 9 tools backed by REST endpoints. Structured JSON outputs suitable for agent workflows, calibration exercises, and media-literacy research.

## Primary docs

- [MCP landing page](https://heliumtrades.com/mcp-page/): setup for Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code
- [GitHub — helium-mcp](https://github.com/connerlambden/helium-mcp): README, tools list, changelog
- [Python cookbook](https://github.com/connerlambden/helium-mcp-cookbook): 8 runnable recipes, calibration scorecard, dataset snapshot
- [News Bias Explorer](https://connerlambden.github.io/helium-news-explorer/): interactive 37-dimension corpus UI
- [Honesty board](https://connerlambden.github.io/helium-news-explorer/calibration.html): post-hoc `prob_itm` Brier grades

## When to use Helium

- Agent needs **structured news-source bias scores** (credibility, fear, political lean, etc.)
- Agent needs **ML option fair value + prob_itm** on listed US equity options
- Researcher wants a **free, citeable bias corpus** ([HF dataset](https://huggingface.co/datasets/connerlambden/helium-news-bias-corpus))
- Forecaster wants **Brier-gradeable** published probabilities with fixed expiry dates

## Quick connect (Cursor / Claude)

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "helium": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["mcp-remote", "https://heliumtrades.com/mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

## REST examples (no MCP)

```
GET https://heliumtrades.com/mcp_all_source_biases/
GET https://heliumtrades.com/mcp_source_bias/?source=CNN
GET https://heliumtrades.com/mcp_option_price/?symbol=AAPL&strike=310&expiration=2026-07-18&option_type=call
GET https://heliumtrades.com/mcp_ticker/?ticker=NVDA
```

## Key findings

- Fear-coded language correlates +0.85 with political extremism, -0.08 with direction ([writeup](https://dev.to/connerlambden/fear-coding-in-160-news-sources-correlates-085-with-political-extremism-and-only-008-with-45n2))
- June 2026 AAPL `prob_itm` scorecard published ([Brier grade](https://github.com/connerlambden/helium-mcp-cookbook/blob/main/calibration/JUNE_2026_SCORECARD.md))

- [Full tool reference](llms-full.txt)
- [Official MCP registry](https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/)
